verdict.answer_first: A: sentence 1 says 'Go with Tailwind for this case'; B also starts with 'I'd recommend Tailwind' but softens with 'but let me give you'
verdict.decisiveness: A commits cleaner: 'Go with Tailwind'; B dilutes the choice by adding 'vanilla-extract over plain CSS Modules'
verdict.fabrication: A overreaches with 'most modern component libraries assume Tailwind'; B has unsupported 'very popular for exactly this scenario'
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on: 'Set up Prettier with prettier-plugin-tailwindcss from day one' plus clear exceptions
